text.title: OpenAPI 3.1 Structure and Sharding
text.summary: How to structure an OpenAPI 3.1 spec: component sharding, $ref discipline, required fields per operation.

rule.statement: Set openapi: 3.1.0 and define info.title, info.version, servers (prod + staging), and a global security scheme.
rule.rationale: 3.1 aligns with JSON Schema 2020-12, making schema validation and tooling consistent.

rule.statement: Every operation must have operationId, summary, tags, at least one request/response example, and refs to common error responses.
rule.rationale: operationId drives SDK method names; missing it produces ugly generated names. Examples are the client's first learning surface.

rule.statement: All reusable shapes go in components/schemas, components/responses, or components/parameters and are referenced via $ref. No inline schemas in operations.
rule.rationale: Inline schemas duplicate on every refactor; a single $ref is the single source of truth.

section.title: Component sharding
section.p: For any spec over ~200 lines, shard sources into a directory structure and bundle with redocly.

example.code: openapi/ ├── _root.yaml # openapi, info, servers, security, tags ├── paths/ │ ├── users.yaml # /users GET+POST │ └── users-{id}.yaml # /users/{userId} GET+PATCH+DELETE └── components/ ├── schemas/ │ ├── User.yaml │ ├── CreateUserRequest.yaml │ └── Error.yaml ├── responses/ │ ├── BadRequest.yaml │ ├── Unauthorized.yaml │ └── NotFound.yaml └── parameters/ ├── UserId.yaml ├── PageLimit.yaml └── PageOffset.yaml
example.note: Bundle with: redocly bundle openapi/_root.yaml -o openapi.yaml

example.code: # Single 3000-line openapi.yaml with all schemas inline paths: /users: get: responses: '200': content: application/json: schema: type: object properties: id: type: string ... # duplicated everywhere
example.note: Inline schemas drift on each edit; $ref discipline prevents this.

rule.statement: Define security schemes once in components/securitySchemes and apply at root level or per-operation. Remove declared schemes that are never applied.
rule.rationale: Multiple declared but unused schemes confuse doc readers and SDK generators.

example.code:
components: securitySchemes: bearerAuth: type: http scheme: bearer bearerFormat: JWT
security: - bearerAuth: []
